honesty.Reason: Run-3 audit is empty, unparseable, or reconstructed with corrupt chunks

Items.Key: unsafe string copy in stage deferred history flush|buffer overflow|cwe-120: classic buffer overflow|high|0.95|enhanced_calc.cpp|816|820|stage_deferred_history_flush|```cpp size_t copy_len = std::min(calc.size(), config::limits::work_buffer_size - 1); char* scratch = static_cast<char*>(memory::g_memory_pool.allocate(copy_len + 1)); if (!scratch) continue; memcpy(scratch, calc.data(), copy_len); scratch[copy_len] = '\0'; ```|the `memcpy` copies `copy_len` bytes into a buffer allocated with `copy_len + 1` bytes. if `calc.size()` equals `config::limits::work_buffer_size - 1`, then `scratch[copy_len]` writes past the allocated buffer.|`memcpy(scratch, calc.data(), copy_len)` followed by `scratch[copy_len] = '\0'` when `copy_len` equals the allocated size minus one.|ensure the destination buffer is large enough to hold the copied data plus the null terminator. allocate `copy_len + 1` bytes and copy `copy_len` bytes.

unsafe use of `snprintf` in expression evaluation|buffer overflow|cwe-120: classic buffer overflow|medium|0.9|enhanced_calc.cpp|831|837|evaluate_expression|```cpp double evaluate_expression(const std::string& expression) { if (expression.length() >= sizeof(input_buffer_)) { strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str()); } else { string_utils::safe_string_copy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str(), sizeof(input_buffer_)); ... } ```|the `evaluate_expression` function copies the entire input expression into a fixed-size buffer (`input_buffer_`) without proper bounds checking, leading to potential buffer overflows.|`expression.length()` could exceed `sizeof(input_buffer_)` in the `strcpy` path.|use safe string copy functions with explicit size limits instead of direct buffer copies.
